l889_correction.cause: L-889 divided mean_lanes (7.5) by total_domains (43) = 17.4%, or used 6.4 lanes from text. Correct metric uses unique domains per session, not total lane count.

key_finding: 15% utilization target is bundle-dependent. Only 21% of sessions reach it (all are bundle sessions with >5 concurrent lanes). Solo sessions: 5-10% coverage. Median 9.3%. Trend slightly negative (-0.013%/session). L-889 inflated: text claims 14.8% but artifact unique-domains metric = 11.9%. Corrected S396-S406 = 14.0% (includes S399 bundle outlier at 34.9%). Current S406-S410 = 5.8% (post-bundle decline).
verdict: RESOLVE — utilization 10.8% mean (9.3% median). 15% target miscalibrated: achievable only in bundle sessions. Solo ceiling ~10%. Real metric is domains-per-session (median 4). Expert dispatch works (UCB1 spreads 28/43 domains over 19 sessions) but per-session breadth constrained by session length, not dispatch quality.
